title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
summary_full: The resolution passed on Tuesday was largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.
summary_public: The resolution passed on Tuesday was largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.
